name: onewire_bus
description: Espressif 1-Wire bus driver (RMT backend). Vendored from github.com/espressif/idf-extra-components, components/onewire_bus v1.1.1. UART backend source (onewire_bus_impl_uart.c) is excluded via srcFilter (RMT only). onewire_bus_impl_uart.h is still pulled in by onewire_bus.h on SOC_UART_SUPPORTED targets (incl. ESP32-S3) and declares onewire_new_bus_uart(), which is intentionally left undefined -- do not call it.
